title: SPAIN enforcement action against CENTRO MEDICO REY FERNANDO, S.L.P. (600)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 600 on CENTRO MEDICO REY FERNANDO, S.L.P. The data controller charged a data subject a fee of €30 for providing her with her medical record, which consisted of just one page. This was the first time the data subject had requested her medical records,...
dedupKey: spain enforcement action against centro medico rey fernando s l p 600|2026-03-13
